---
title: "Homework_7"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

# Examine the structure
glimpse(iris)
str(iris)
dim(iris)

# Check dimensions
head(iris)
iris1 <- iris %>%
  filter(Species %in% c("virginica", "versicolor"),
         Sepal.Length > 6,
         Sepal.Width > 2.5)
dim(iris1)

iris2 <- select(iris1,
                Species,
                Sepal.Length,
                Sepal.Width)

dim(iris2)

iris3 <- arrange(iris2, desc(Sepal.Length))

head(iris3)

iris4 <- mutate(iris3,
                Sepal.Area = Sepal.Length * Sepal.Width)

dim(iris4)

iris5 <- summarize(iris4,
                   avg_sepal_length = mean(Sepal.Length),
                   avg_sepal_width = mean(Sepal.Width),
                   sample_size = n())

iris5
iris6 <- iris4 %>%
  group_by(Species) %>%
  summarize(avg_sepal_length = mean(Sepal.Length),
            avg_sepal_width = mean(Sepal.Width),
            sample_size = n())

iris6

irisFinal <- iris %>%
  filter(Species %in% c("virginica","versicolor"),
         Sepal.Length > 6,
         Sepal.Width > 2.5) %>%
  select(Species, Sepal.Length, Sepal.Width) %>%
  arrange(desc(Sepal.Length)) %>%
  mutate(Sepal.Area = Sepal.Length * Sepal.Width)

irisFinal

iris_long <- iris %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(Sepal.Length, Sepal.Width, Petal.Length, Petal.Width),
               names_to = "Measure",
               values_to = "Value") %>%
  select(Species, Measure, Value)

head(iris_long)
```
